lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry. Sledding is dangerous business.

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: That it is. It also dangerous business going back to generals without glowy flying things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here?

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: Over by water there is crack in the wall.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. Will you make it out by yourself?

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: Scrubfoot needs a minute before moving.

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: General Wartface send Scrubfoot to get green glowy flying things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess you won't be able to get the green ones now.

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: It not matter. If Scrubfoot get green fireflies, General Bentnoze kick Scrubfoot. If not get green fireflies, General Wartface kick Scrubfoot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seems like you can't win with those generals. What if you got them both green and red?

lines.speaker: Scrubfoot
lines.text: Scrubfoot busy. Must scrub generals' feet.
